architecture.note: binding guard fail-closed before any process start (ADR-004); read-only gate extended with the new process-start rule + relay allow-list (ADR-003); SessionBridge is an EXPAND-Create port, CLI called by the adapter not wrapped (ADR-002); shared stream-json mapper extracted at the 2-consumer threshold

security.note: no secrets; SESSION_CHANGE_MISMATCH refuses with zero bytes + no process touched; structured relay log carries no prompt/reply body (NFR-SEC-03); process-start confined to the one sanctioned adapter; localhost-only bind unchanged

quality.note: no as-any / : any in production source; no empty catches (parse-skip blocks are documented + intentional); 10 new source files covered by 9 dedicated test files + the contract suite; typecheck + eslint clean
